zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Kynnardsleye於1240年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾武托希特時，他的父親Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye20歲，母親Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye20歲。他於1260年與Elizabeth Salway在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾武托希特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1260年在他的家鄉享年20歲。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Kynnardsleye was born in 1240, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye, was 20 and his mother, Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye, was 20. He married Elizabeth Salway in 1260, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1260, in his hometown, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Kynnardsleye est né en 1240, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Salway en 1260, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 20 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Kynnardsleye 1240 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye 20 und seine Mutter Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye 20. Er hat 1260 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Salway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 20 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Kynnardsleye è nato il nel 1240 nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Salway nel 1260, nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1260, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 20 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Kynnardsleye(이)가 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 Elizabeth Salway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1260년 그의 고향에서 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Kynnardsleye родился в 1240 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Salway в 1260 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1260 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 20 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Kynnardsleye nació en 1240, en Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh de Kynnardsleye, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs. Lady Hugh de Kynnardsleye, tenía 20 años.
